notes.description: The shared template includes pause marker wording in skill spec but the actual output generation does not enforce these checkpoints. All 3 evals show has_pause_markers: false.
notes.action: Rework checkpoint design to make pause markers mandatory output elements, not optional suggestions. Add explicit test branches that fail if pause markers are missing in staged mode.

notes.description: The skip mechanism trigger phrases ('直接要结果', '跳过检查', '不用确认') are documented but direct_result_mode_detected is false even when user explicitly says '不用确认' (eval 161).
notes.action: Tighten the interaction protocol contract to explicitly define trigger phrase detection as a hard requirement. Add eval expectations that specifically test skip mechanism activation.

notes.description: In eval 162, skill asked for info but still displayed pyramid structure elements prematurely, violating the Step 0 info-gathering phase contract.
notes.action: Add explicit guardrails in Step 0 that prohibit any pyramid structure output until info completeness threshold (3+ items) is met. Provide clear examples of info-gathering vs. structure-building outputs.

notes.description: Output format specifies pause blocks but there's no enforcement mechanism. The output contract is unclear about when pause markers are mandatory vs. optional.
notes.action: Refine output contract to explicitly state: 'In staged mode, every step output MUST end with the exact pause block text. Missing pause block = evaluation failure.'
